description: Holy symbols, blessed objects, moral triggers, and virtue-based vulnerabilities.
weaknesses: Sacred Symbol Burn
Holy symbols of the right deity burn on contact, regardless of the wielder's faith. Scorch marks on its skin match temple iconography.
Children's Innocence
It cannot harm a truly innocent child. It avoids schools, targets only adults, and weakens in the presence of the young.
Blessed Threshold
A doorway blessed by clergy becomes a wall it cannot pass. It avoids temples, prefers windows, and has been known to tear door frames apart in frustration.
Wedding Vow Power
Marriage vows spoken in its presence become commands it must obey. It disrupts weddings, avoids chapels, and flinches at the words 'I do.'
Charity Paralysis
Witnessing a genuine act of selflessness freezes it in place. It corrupts charitable organizations and preys only on the selfish.
Earned Victory Only
It cannot win by luck or chance. Every victory must be earned through skill. It never gambles, despises randomness, and lays overly complicated plans.
Honest Child Truth
It cannot lie to a child under ten. Their innocence compels honest answers, and clever children can pry loose its deepest secrets.
Wedding Ring Burn
The touch of a wedding ring sears its flesh. It targets the unmarried, strips rings from its victims, and recoils from symbols of binding love.
Love's True Touch
Genuine love causes it pain. The purer the feeling, the worse the wound. It separates loved ones, corrupts bonds, and cannot stand near wedding rings.
Sleeping Child Ward
It cannot enter a room where a child sleeps. Innocent dreams form a barrier it cannot breach. It waits for children to wake and despises lullabies.
Nest Destroyer Guilt
It cannot harm birds or destroy their nests. Birds perch fearlessly on its shoulders, and avian sanctuaries are safe ground.
Unicorn Hair Binding
A single strand of unicorn hair can hold it completely still. Purity overcomes all its strength, and it avoids pure creatures with visible dread.
